title: Dihl 1KG Silver Sand, Fine Grade for Aquariums, Terrariums, Bird Cages, Planters or Flowerpots. 0.15mm to 0.25mm Grain Size, Non-Toxic Natural Substrate Decoration, 1 KG
features: Versatile Usage: Ideal for a wide range of applications including aquariums, terrariums, bird cages, planters, and flowerpots, making it a multifunctional choice for various environments and setups.
Grain Size: With a grain size of 0.15mm to 0.25mm, this sand provides a smooth, even substrate that is gentle on the delicate structures of aquatic life, birds, and plant roots.
Non-Toxic and Natural: Made from non-toxic, natural materials, this silver sand ensures a safe and healthy habitat for all inhabitants, whether they are fish, reptiles, birds, or plants.
Aesthetic Enhancement: The subtle silver hue and fine texture add a sophisticated and attractive element to any setting, enhancing the visual appeal of aquariums, terrariums, and planters.

Functional Benefits: Provides a stable base for aquatic plants, facilitates easy cleaning in bird cages, and supports healthy plant growth in planters and flowerpots, making it a practical substrate for a variety of uses.
description: Product description The Dihl Silver Sand, with a fine grade grain size of 0.15mm to 0.25mm, is a versatile and non-toxic natural substrate perfect for a wide range of applications, including aquariums, terrariums, bird cages, planters, and flowerpots. Its fine texture provides a smooth and comfortable base, enhancing the aesthetic appeal of any environment. Whether used to create a naturalistic setting for aquatic life, a cozy habitat for birds, or an attractive surface for plants, this silver sand offers both decorative charm and functional benefits. Safe and natural, it ensures a healthy environment for all inhabitants, making it an ideal choice for various decorative and practical uses. Directions Once washed, create a base layer of sand in your aquarium, aiming for a depth of 1–2 inches, depending on your preferences and the needs of your fish and plants. Ensure that the sand is evenly distributed across the tank's bottom.
